description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that caches /root/.cache and runs a before_script installing tox and setuptools. Define two stages: style and test. Add a flake8 job in the style stage using the python:3.6 image that executes tox -e flake8. Add a py35 job in the test stage using the python:3.5 image that executes tox -e py35, and a py36 job in the test stage using the python:3.6 image that executes tox -e py36. No additional rules, artifacts, or services are required.
